notes: Live product search-grammar capture keeps the quoted-phrase, bare-term, term-local negation, `NOT` modifier, `tag_not`, and `published_at:*` exists slices separate from the broader grouped/prefix advanced-search fixture so later parity work can compare those merchant-facing grammar increments directly. The `NOT`/`tag_not` request also uses PUBLISHED_AT ordering, which is modelable from normalized product state.
